paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces disentangled attention, where each word is represented by separate content and position vectors, and attention weights are computed using disentangled matrices on content and relative positions. Also introduces an enhanced mask decoder that incorporates absolute word positions during decoding to improve masked token prediction
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Wikipedia (English Wikipedia dump), BookCorpus, OpenWebText, Stories (subset of CommonCrawl)
raw_extraction.application: Natural Language Understanding (NLU), Natural Language Generation (NLG), question answering, text classification
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving language understanding through better pre-training and decoding mechanisms
